_readme: The Gallery page + the 'Recent work' row on Home. featuredId: the id of the portrait shown large on Home (must match an id below). Each piece: id (unique, no spaces), title (pet's name), category (Dogs / Cats / Ornaments / Studies), ratio (width ÷ height of the image), thumb + full (paths under /paintings/). To add a portrait see CONTENT.md. TODO(pre-launch): replace placeholder titles Scout/Marmalade/Blue/Cocoa with the real pet names.

pieces.title: Apollo
pieces.alt: Expressive acrylic portrait of a dog named Apollo, painted in bold brushstrokes.
